title: Create blockchain-based secure document vault

requirements.text: Create a backend document storage system with stable memory persistence that stores document metadata (id, name, owner principal, upload timestamp, file size, content hash) and encrypted document content as Blob data
acceptanceCriteria: Documents are stored with unique IDs in stable storage
Each document includes owner principal, timestamp, and content hash
Document content is stored as encrypted Blob data
System survives canister upgrades without data loss

requirements.text: Implement backend methods for uploading documents (addDocument), retrieving document list for authenticated user (listMyDocuments), downloading specific documents by ID (getDocument), and deleting user's own documents (deleteDocument)
acceptanceCriteria: Upload accepts document name and encrypted content, returns document ID
List returns only documents owned by the caller
Download verifies caller owns the document before returning content
Delete verifies ownership before removing document

requirements.text: Implement access control ensuring users can only access, download, and delete their own documents based on Internet Identity principal
acceptanceCriteria: All document operations verify caller principal matches document owner
Unauthorized access attempts are rejected with appropriate error messages
Anonymous principals cannot perform any document operations

requirements.text: Create a document upload interface with file picker, drag-and-drop support, client-side encryption before upload, and upload progress indicator
acceptanceCriteria: Users can select files via button click or drag-and-drop
Files are encrypted on the client before transmission
Upload progress is displayed during file transfer
Success confirmation is shown after successful upload

requirements.text: Build a document vault dashboard displaying a list of user's documents with name, upload date, file size, and action buttons for download and delete
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows all documents owned by authenticated user
Each document displays name, formatted upload date, and human-readable file size
Download button triggers client-side decryption and file download
Delete button removes document after user confirmation
Empty state is shown when user has no documents

requirements.text: Implement client-side file encryption and decryption using Web Crypto API with a user-specific encryption key derived from their Internet Identity principal
acceptanceCriteria: Encryption key is consistently derived from user's principal
Files are encrypted before upload to backend
Downloaded files are automatically decrypted for the user
Encryption/decryption operations handle errors gracefully

requirements.text: Add Internet Identity authentication flow requiring users to authenticate before accessing the document vault
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users see a login prompt
Login button initiates Internet Identity authentication
After successful authentication, user can access vault features
User's principal is available for backend authorization

requirements.text: Design a cohesive visual theme with a secure, professional aesthetic using dark tones, minimalist layout, and subtle security-focused design elements that reinforce trust and data protection
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses dark, professional tones that avoid blue and purple
Typography is clean and readable with appropriate hierarchy
Layout emphasizes security and organization
Visual elements consistently reinforce the vault security concept

constraints: All document operations must verify owner principal matches caller principal
Documents must persist across canister upgrades using stable storage
File encryption/decryption must occur entirely on the client side
Only Internet Identity authentication is supported

required: Security-themed vault logo icon with lock and shield elements in monochrome (vault-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Abstract geometric background pattern suggesting encrypted data in dark tones (encrypted-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
